description: Expected results for out-of-range seq rejection test

expected_messages.description: Start accepted, declares 2 expected DataValues (valid seqs 0..1)
DataValue seq=0 observed correctly (no response expected)
DataValue seq=5 dropped by handleData (out of range) - no side effects on GapSet (no response expected)
End must yield ReqRet for the still-missing seq=1 (proves seq=5 did not contaminate the GapSet)
Retransmitted seq=1 observed correctly (no response expected)

Final end_ack(Status_Ok) after the GapSet is complete. Timeout is generous (60s) because the bulk thread has a FlushInterval of 20s and the End must wait for the bulk POST to OpenSearch to complete before the notify callback fires the final ack.

validation_rules.session_consistency: All messages share the same session ID
validation_rules.message_order: start -> data(0) -> data(5, OOR) -> end -> data(1) -> end
validation_rules.response_format: First End triggers ReqRet; second End triggers end_ack(Status_Ok)
validation_rules.out_of_range_handling: seq=5 must NOT mark anything in the GapSet, so the End correctly identifies seq=1 as the only missing sequence
